title: All of this supports the construction of ‘act or omission’ in s 5 as meaning ‘all acts or omissions’, without any restriction as to the nature of the act being read into it.

evidence.raw_text: 66.		All of this supports the construction of ‘act or omission’ in s 5 as meaning ‘all acts or omissions’, without any restriction as to the nature of the act being read into it.
